title: Sigg - Aluminum Water Bottle - Traveller - Climate Neutral Certified - Suitable For Carbonated Beverages - Leakproof & Lightweight - BPA Free - 0.6L / 1L/ 1.5L
features: All-Rounder – The water flask is a striking dark blue shade and has a simple design; It is ideal for various leisure activities – whether for sports or travel
Leak-Proof – With the hygienic and practical screw cap, this metal travel bottle is guaranteed to be leak-proof, even when used to carry carbonated drinks
Robust Material – The sports bottle with screw cap is made of food-safe, stable and yet lightweight aluminium, meaning it can be carried with just one finger
Safe Drinking – All materials used to make the metal water bottle are BPA-free and contain no pollutants such as oestrogenic substances or phthalates
Delivery and Details – SIGG metal drink bottle 15 L, lightweight and leak-proof bottle, wash by hand, pollutant- and BPA-free, made in Switzerland, item number: 8256,10
description: SIGG Lucid Glacier Touch Leak-proof Drinking Bottle with Screw Cap 0.6 L The SIGG Lucid Glacier touch drinking bottle is the ideal companion for all leisure activities, when travelling, in the office or at school. The drinking bottle is in a fresh design in delicate turquoise. The screw cap is guaranteed to stay tight at all times. So the leak-proof water bottle is also ideal for carbonated drinks. Thanks to its special lid design, the water bottle can also be easily held and carried with just one finger - ideal for travelling. Thanks to the high-quality aluminium, the drinking bottle is light as a feather and ideal for taking with you. The inner coating ensures that there are no unpleasant odours in the bottle and the taste always remains neutral. The drinking bottle made of food-safe materials is BPA-free and contains no harmful substances - this includes phthalates or estrogen-active substances. Product advantages in detail: Leak-proof water bottle. With screw cap. Lightweight and durable Material: aluminium. Inner coating for neutral taste Free from harmful substances. Capacity: 0.6 litres. Made in Switzerland
